name: Anti-uPAR CAR T cells reverse and prevent aging-associated defects in intestinal regeneration and fitness
short_name: uPAR CAR T intestinal aging study
summary: A 2026 Nature Aging study testing therapeutic and prophylactic anti-uPAR CAR T-cell treatment in aged mice, with intestinal barrier, regeneration, inflammation, mucosal immune, microbiome, and fitness-related endpoints.
